External Agent: 
Based on what’s generally available for budget-conscious solo travel in Paris, here are two recommendations that should keep your overall 5-day trip well within your €900 limit:

1. Backpacker’s Base – This is a budget-friendly hostel option, offering a communal atmosphere and essential amenities. It’s priced at about €65 per night, which makes it very appealing for solo travelers looking to minimize costs.

2. Artistic Abode – For a bit more comfort in a creative setting, this option is available at approximately €95 per night. It offers a unique vibe that many solo travelers appreciate when looking for a change from the typical hostel setting.

Both of these options have worked well for many who are keen to explore Paris without stretching their budget too much. Additionally, to ensure our recommendation matches your personal style and previous successful experiences, could you share whether you’ve usually leaned towards a more communal hostel environment or if you’ve had a preference for smaller, budget hotels in your past trips? This insight can help us fine-tune the accommodations to best suit your travel needs.

• Estimated Daily Expenses for Meals & Activities: Setting aside an average of €50 per day covers casual dining, light snacks, and one or two low-cost activities. Over 5 days, that totals approximately €250.
